whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Bot – Verify Gold in Chat
whatsapp.subtitle: No app. No login. Just send a message on WhatsApp to verify HUID, get live gold prices, and receive fraud alerts.
whatsapp.benefit2: Instant HUID checks using BIS-style data
whatsapp.benefit3: Gold price alerts directly on your phone
whatsapp.helper: Send HELP, PRICE, VERIFY AB1234 or ALERT ON to get started.
whatsapp.alertsCaption: Get notified when gold prices move – perfect for planning your purchase.

step2.description: Real gold rates are fetched from authorized APIs

verify.title: 🔍 Verify BIS Hallmark
verify.subtitle: Enter HUID code to verify authentic BIS hallmarks
verify.huidHelper: HUID is an 8-character code found on BIS hallmark label
verify.valid: ✅ This hallmark is registered with BIS. The jewellery is authentic.
verify.invalid: ❌ This HUID code is not registered or invalid. Be cautious of this jewellery.
verify.advice: What to do: Do not purchase jewellery without proper BIS hallmark. Report to nearest BIS office.
